$comment: Project MCP servers → becomes <repo>/.mcp.json. 'aws-docs' is light and auto-approved via the global settings.json enabledMcpjsonServers list. 'playwright' and 'github' are heavier and stay DISABLED until you enable them for a session (via /mcp, or add to enabledMcpjsonServers). A pure-backend repo can delete the entries it doesn't need. Package names/commands verified 2026-06-30.
$note_trust: As of CC v2.1.196, a freshly cloned repo's .mcp.json approvals are ignored until you trust the workspace (run `claude` in it and accept the trust dialog). Expected; approve once per machine.

mcpServers.$comment_github: OPTIONAL. The gh CLI is the default GitHub path in this stack (lighter context, already in the permission allow-list). Enable this remote server only if you want a dedicated github-ops agent driving the GitHub MCP toolset; it requires an OAuth sign-in on first use (/mcp). Keep it OFF for normal work.
